Licenses

Last updated: July 1, 2026

Banking licenses

Global Banking Empowerment operates under the following licenses and regulatory authorizations:

  • Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) — Certificate #35241
  • Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) — National Bank Charter
  • Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) — Registered lender
  • FinCEN — Money Services Business registration

State licenses

We are licensed to operate in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Specific state licenses are available upon request.

Third-party software

Our platform incorporates the following open-source and licensed software:

  • Normalize.css — MIT License
  • Inter font family — SIL Open Font License
  • Chart.js — MIT License
  • Axios — MIT License

Trademarks

Global Banking Empowerment, GBE, and associated logos are registered trademarks of Global Banking Empowerment, Inc. All rights reserved.
